pi_items.source: Verified from task.json and verifier.py code; name follows synthetic test data naming patterns (common surname combined with first name). Web search for test data generation shows 'Rodriguez' is standard in test data generators.

Verified from task.json and verifier.py code; name follows synthetic test data naming patterns using diverse ethnic backgrounds (Nakamura suggests Japanese heritage, typical for representative synthetic datasets).
Confirmed in new_store_configuration/export_result.ps1 (line 9) and create_service_items/export_result.sh (line 9). This is the standard application-wide data path for NCH Copper POS database.

Confirmed in multiple task export scripts (new_store_configuration/export_result.ps1 lines 39-44, create_service_items/export_result.sh line 10). This is the standard per-user roaming profile path for NCH Copper POS.

pi_items.verified_value: Copper Point of Sale (by NCH Software, version 3.06)
pi_items.source: NCH Software official website (https://www.nchsoftware.com/point-of-sale/index.html) and environment documentation (README.md line 5). Downloaded installer from https://www.nchsoftware.com/point-of-sale/possetupfree.exe

The operator names (Emily Rodriguez, James Nakamura) are synthetically generated test data following common test data generation patterns. They do not appear to be based on real employees from any specific organization, but rather are plausible fictional names created for testing purposes.

privileged_info_summary: This task tests creating two operator accounts in Copper POS v3.06: 'Emily Rodriguez' and 'James Nakamura'. Both names are synthetic test data following standard test data generation patterns (using common surnames and diverse given names). The operator data is stored in the Copper database at standard Windows paths: C:\ProgramData\NCH Software\Copper\Shared\copper.db for application-wide data and C:\Users\[USER]\AppData\Roaming\NCH Software\Copper\Shared\copper.db for user-specific data. The software is real commercial POS software by NCH Software, downloadable from their official website.
